Table 'Altair II' 6-max Seat #1 is the button
Seat 1: BTNPlayer ($2.00 in chips)
Seat 2: SBPlayer ($2.00 in chips)
Seat 3: Hero ($2.00 in chips)
Seat 4: UTGPlayer ($2.00 in chips)
Seat 5: HJPlayer ($2.00 in chips)
Seat 6: COPlayer ($2.00 in chips)
SBPlayer: posts small blind $0.01
Hero: posts big blind $0.02
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to Hero [2c 7d]
UTGPlayer: calls $0.02
HJPlayer: folds
COPlayer: folds
BTNPlayer: folds
SBPlayer: folds
Hero: checks
*** FLOP *** [Ks 9h 3d]
Hero: checks
UTGPlayer: checks
*** TURN *** [Ks 9h 3d] [2h]
Hero: checks
UTGPlayer: checks
*** RIVER *** [Ks 9h 3d 2h] [5c]
Hero: checks
UTGPlayer: checks
*** SHOW DOWN ***
Hero: shows [2c 7d] (one pair, Twos)
UTGPlayer: shows [Ac 4c] (high card Ace)
Hero collected $0.04 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot $0.05 | Rake $0.01
Board [Ks 9h 3d 2h 5c]
Seat 1: BTNPlayer (button) folded before Flop (didn't bet)
Seat 2: SBPlayer (small blind) folded before Flop
Seat 3: Hero (big blind) showed [2c 7d] and won ($0.04) with one pair, Twos
Seat 4: UTGPlayer showed [Ac 4c] and lost with high card Ace
